introSection: Rattlesnake Coaster (originally named the Paul Bunyan Express and later re-themed to Ladybug Coaster in 2001) was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Adventureland in Farmingdale, New York, USA. In 2019, the coaster received new tracks and the snake coaster carts.
fullText:
Rattlesnake Coaster (originally named the Paul Bunyan Express and later re-themed to Ladybug Coaster in 2001) was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Adventureland in Farmingdale, New York, USA. In 2019, the coaster received new tracks and the snake coaster carts.



Red track and green supports.




 * Official website
